query:
SELECT 'reservations' as tbl, id, customer_name, customer_email FROM reservations WHERE customer_name LIKE '%Carlos%' OR customer_name LIKE '%Calin%';
SELECT 'clients' as tbl, id, name, email, createdAt FROM clients WHERE name LIKE '%Carlos%' OR name LIKE '%Calin%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rp6zCMfN7Vv5FK.root --database AV298FS8t5SaTurBBRqhgQ --execute SELECT 'reservations' as tbl, id, customer_name, customer_email FROM reservations WHERE customer_name LIKE '%Carlos%' OR customer_name LIKE '%Calin%';
SELECT 'clients' as tbl, id, name, email, createdAt FROM clients WHERE name LIKE '%Carlos%' OR name LIKE '%Calin%';
